provider.enableHint: Only models from enabled providers appear in the available model list

promptCache.label: Prompt Cache
promptCache.description: Enable prompt caching for the system prompt and tool list to cut input cost on repeat requests. Currently honored only by Anthropic models.
promptCache.descriptionOff: Disabling caching rebills the full system prompt and tool list on every request. Only use this for strict context isolation.

oauth.openaiDescription: Authorize this provider with your ChatGPT account for Codex-compatible OpenAI access.
oauth.openaiCreateHint: Save the provider first, then authorize it from the provider details panel.

oauth.githubDeviceDescription: Start device authorization, open GitHub's verification page, and enter the user code shown below.

oauth.githubDeviceHint: Open the verification URL below and enter this user code to authorize the current Memoh account.

status.notConfigured: This provider is not configured for OAuth.

memory.title: Memory Providers
memory.emptyDescription: Add a memory provider to enable long-term memory for your bots
memory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this memory provider? Bots using it will lose memory access.
memory.name: Name
memory.builtinModeDescription: Choose how the built-in memory provider stores and retrieves memory for bots.
memory.sparseInstallHint: Sparse mode depends on the optional sparse service. Enable the sparse installation option when running the installer or start the sparse profile in Docker Compose.
memory.denseEmbeddingModelDescription: Select the third-party embedding model used before local rerank.
memory.denseQdrantHint: Dense memory will use Qdrant as the storage backend after the backend runtime is connected.
memory.sparseQdrantCollectionDescription: Sparse mode writes to the Qdrant collection. Current/default collection: {collection}.
memory.denseQdrantCollectionDescription: Dense mode writes to the Qdrant collection. Current/default collection: {collection}.

modeDescriptions.off: Keep the current file-based built-in memory behavior without Qdrant retrieval.
modeDescriptions.sparse: Use the local OpenSearch sparse model for memory indexing and retrieval with Qdrant.
modeDescriptions.dense: Use the selected embedding model API to build dense vectors and store/search them directly in Qdrant.

posture.title: Security Posture
posture.description: Approval policies are actively enforcing execution boundaries.

warnings.breachRisk: Resetting will clear all custom security rules.

toolApproval.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all tool approval rules to their default state?
toolApproval.resetWarningExtra: Custom bypass and review rules will be lost.
toolApproval.title: Tool Call Approval
toolApproval.intro: Require approval before the bot modifies files or runs commands. Configure rules for each tool below. Bypass patterns auto-approve; must-review patterns force approval.

tools.write: Create new files inside the container
tools.edit: Modify existing files inside the container
tools.exec: Execute shell commands inside the container

toolApproval.toolDisabledHint: Approval is currently off for this tool. The rules below take effect only after enabling the switch.
toolApproval.bypassHint: Calls matching any of these patterns are auto-approved without prompting.
toolApproval.mustReviewHint: Calls matching any of these patterns always trigger approval, even when this tool is otherwise auto-approved.

bots.title: Bots
bots.createBotWaitHint: First-time creation may pull base images and take a moment.
bots.createBotSetupDesc: Creating the bot and workspace container. The page will open it automatically when it is ready.
bots.createBotLocalHint: Local bots use a folder on this computer and are not sandboxed.
bots.workspaceBackendHint: Container workspaces are isolated. Local workspaces run directly on this computer.
bots.localWorkspacePathPlaceholder: Choose a folder on this computer
bots.localWorkspaceWarning: Local workspaces run directly on the host using the server's permissions, giving them full access to local files and commands.
bots.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bot?
bots.emptyDescription: Click the button above to create your first bot
bots.timezoneInheritedHint: Leave empty to inherit the user's timezone, or fall back to the system timezone.
bots.aclPresetDescription: Start with a standard ACL preset. You can tweak it later in Access Control.
bots.aclPresetHint: Tip: use 'Private Only' for personal bots, 'Group Only' or 'Group and Thread' for community bots, and 'Allow All' to stay completely open.
bots.aclPresetHelp: This sets up your default ACL effect and initial rules. You can adjust them anytime from the Access Control page.

allowAll.title: Allow All
allowAll.description: Adds no extra restriction and allows all conversation types by default.

privateOnly.title: Private Only
privateOnly.description: Defaults to deny and only allows private conversations.

groupOnly.title: Group Only
groupOnly.description: Defaults to deny and only allows group conversations.

groupAndThreadOnly.title: Group and Thread
groupAndThreadOnly.description: Defaults to deny and allows group conversations plus threads.

denyAll.title: Deny All
denyAll.description: Defaults to deny and adds no rules, so you can configure access manually later.

bots.editAvatarDescription: Set the image URL for the bot avatar.
bots.editTimezoneDescription: Set a timezone override for this bot.

checks.title: Runtime Checks
checks.subtitle: View current health status and issue details.

desktop.subtitle: Manage virtual display and interaction sessions.
desktop.liveDescription: Live preview of the workspace desktop.

container.title: Container
container.subtitle: Manage the runtime environment for this bot.
container.botNotReady: Bot lifecycle transition in progress. Container actions disabled.
container.empty: No container found. Create one to enable runtime tools.
container.legacyWarning: Old architecture detected. Recreate for full compatibility (data preserved automatically).
container.createHint: Container created from current image. Enable restore to recover preserved data.
container.createRestoreDataDescription: Existing backups or legacy data will be restored into `/data` automatically.
container.createImageDescription: Docker image for the container base (e.g. debian:bookworm-slim). Leave empty for default.
container.createAdvancedDescription: Configure GPU access and raw CDI device mappings.
container.createGpuDescription: Attach host GPU access to the new container.
container.createGpuDevicesDescription: Enter one CDI device per line or use commas. Turning GPU off clears saved preferences.
container.gpuDevicesRequired: At least one CDI device is required for GPU.
container.gpuRecreateHint: GPU changes require recreation. A simple start/stop will not update devices.
container.deleteConfirm: Delete this container permanently? Unpreserved data cannot be recovered.
container.deletePreserveConfirm: Export `/data` and then delete this container?
container.rollbackConfirm: Roll back to this snapshot version?
container.snapshotNameHint: User-visible display name; system generates internal name.
container.metricsUnsupported: Resource monitoring not supported by backend.
container.metricsStopped: Container not running; viewing storage only.
container.dataSubtitle: Manage import, export, and restore for `/data`.
container.deleteSubtitle: Confirm whether to preserve `/data` before deletion.
container.deleteZoneDesc: Deleting this container cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.

blocks.contextDescription: Configure how this bot remembers and processes information.
blocks.interactionDescription: Configure how the bot engages in conversations.
blocks.multimediaDescription: Configure voice and image generation models.

settings.titleModelDescription: Pick a lightweight model to automatically title conversations. Leave empty to disable.
settings.sparseStatusHint: Markdown files are the source of truth. Syncing rebuilds the Qdrant index from /data/memory.
settings.denseStatusHint: Markdown files are the source of truth. Syncing rebuilds the dense Qdrant index from /data/memory.
settings.mem0StatusHint: Markdown files are the source of truth. Syncing rebuilds Mem0 memories from /data/memory.
settings.indexedMemoryStatusPendingSave: Save the selected memory provider before viewing indexed memory status or running a sync.
settings.memorySyncSuccess: Sync completed: {fsCount} source entries, {restoredCount} restored, {storageCount} indexed.
settings.imageModelDescription: Model used for the generate_image tool. Must support image-output compatibility.
settings.heartbeatDescription: Periodically trigger agent to check for items that need attention
settings.heartbeatModelDescription: Select a model for heartbeat checks. Defaults to the bot's chat model if not set.
settings.compactionDescription: Automatically summarize older messages when context gets too large
settings.compactionRatioDescription: The percentage of older messages to summarize. Recent messages are kept intact.
settings.compactionModelDescription: Select a model for summarization. Defaults to the bot's chat model if not set.
settings.showToolCallsInIMDescription: Show live tool execution status (running / complete / failed) directly in the chat. Disabled by default.
settings.displayEnabledDescription: Launch Xvnc alongside the container. Restart the workspace for this to take effect.
settings.desktopEnabledDescription: Enable the VNC desktop. Memoh will automatically provision Debian/Ubuntu or Alpine workspaces if missing.
settings.toolApprovalDescription: Require human approval for sensitive write, edit, and exec tool calls, with bypass templates for safe paths or commands.
settings.botStatusSubtitle: Current workspace container and base network info.
settings.networkPageSubtitle: Workspace network status and SD-WAN settings.
settings.overlayProviderPlaceholder: Select a solution (turn off to skip SD-WAN)
settings.overlayProviderRequired: Choose a connection type before enabling.
settings.networkStatusPendingSave: Network settings changed. Save before checking the current status.

networkWorkspaceState.task_stopped: Workspace not running or task not started

settings.networkNeedsLoginDescription: Authentication required. Open the link below to log in to your SD-WAN provider.
settings.networkNeedsLoginHint: Once logged in via your browser, return here to refresh.
settings.networkExitNodeSectionHint: Route all outbound traffic through a Tailscale exit node for transparent proxying.
settings.networkExitNodeDescription: Choose an exit node from the candidate list for the selected connection type.
settings.networkExitNodeRequired: Transparent egress requires selecting an exit node.
settings.networkNodesPendingSave: Save the current network settings before refreshing the node list.
settings.networkNodesEmpty: No exit node candidates yet. Ensure the bot workspace is running and networking is connected.
settings.networkNodesRefreshFailed: Failed to refresh exit node list
settings.allowGuestPersonalHint: ACL rules apply to all bot types.
settings.deleteBotDescription: Deleting this bot cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.

access.title: Access Control
access.subtitle: Use blacklist or whitelist mode to control who can trigger this bot's chat.
access.defaultEffectDescription: Applied when no rule matches an inbound message.
access.modeDescription: Choose whether messages are allowed or blocked by default. List entries override the default mode.
access.blacklistModeDescription: Allow everyone by default, then block the entries on the blacklist.
access.blacklistModeHint: Default is allow. New entries are added to the blacklist.
access.whitelistModeDescription: Block everyone except those you explicitly allow.
access.whitelistModeHint: Default is deny. New entries are added to the whitelist.
access.blacklistDescription: Anyone on this list is blocked.
access.whitelistDescription: Only people on this list get through.
access.blacklistEmptyDescription: No blocks active. Anyone not matched by other rules is allowed.
access.whitelistEmptyDescription: No allowed entries yet. Anyone not matched by other rules is blocked.
access.userQuestion: Which User Does This Apply To?
access.rulesEmptyDescription: Add a rule to override the default behavior.
access.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
access.specificConversationDescription: Most people don't need this. Use it only if you want to target a single group, DM, or thread.
access.noObservedConversations: We haven't seen any conversations matching this yet. You can enter IDs manually below, or wait for the bot to show up in those chats.
access.manualConversationIdsHint: Only use this if you can't find the chat in history. You'll need to grab the IDs directly from the platform.
access.pickTargetForConversationSearch: Choose a platform or user first to see their conversations.
access.pickIdentityForConversationSearch: Pick a user to search their chat history.
access.pickChannelTypeForConversationSearch: Pick a platform to search its chat history.

channels.title: Platforms
channels.emptyDescription: Click below to add an access platform for this bot
channels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this platform?
channels.webhookCallbackHint: Use this URL as the webhook callback URL in the platform console.
channels.webhookCallbackPending: Save this platform configuration to generate the callback URL.
channels.feishuWebhookSecurityHint: For security, webhook mode requires either an Encrypt Key or a Verification Token; an unprotected public callback URL should not be exposed.
channels.feishuWebhookSecretRequired: For security, configure at least one of Encrypt Key or Verification Token.
channels.noAvailableTypes: All platform types have been configured

memory.compactConfirm: Are you sure you want to compact the memory? This will merge similar content using AI and may reduce the number of entries.
memory.compactRatioAggressiveDesc: Heavily consolidate, keep core facts only.

skills.title: Skills
skills.discoveryDescription: Manage where this bot stores managed skills and which external paths are scanned.
skills.managedPathHint: "Copy to Managed Path" copies an external skill here. Managed copies take precedence.
skills.discoveryPathsDescription: Memoh scans these absolute paths for compatible external skills. One path per line.
skills.discoveryEmpty: No external skill paths. Only managed and legacy skills will be scanned.
skills.discoveryPathReserved: This path is reserved for Memoh-managed or legacy skills
skills.emptyDescription: Create a managed skill or scan external paths to get started.
skills.overrideTitle: Edit to create a managed copy
skills.adoptFailed: Failed to copy skill to managed path
skills.intro: Configure custom abilities for this bot. Managed skills take precedence.

compaction.title: Compaction Logs
compaction.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all compaction logs? This cannot be undone.

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat Logs
heartbeat.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all heartbeat logs? This cannot be undone.
heartbeat.description: Heartbeat allows the bot to periodically scan for items needing attention, ensuring tasks are processed even when not directly messaged.
heartbeat.filterEmpty: No logs matching the selected status filter.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Configure automated tasks. Use the visual builder or cron expressions for precise control.
schedule.name: Name
schedule.deleteConfirm: Delete task "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
schedule.dangerZoneDesc: Task deletion is permanent. Proceed with caution.

form.name: Task Name
form.commandHint: This command is sent to the bot as a message upon triggering.
form.manualEditHint: Manual edits will sync with the visual builder.
form.advancedHint: Supports standard Cron format and @daily descriptors.

modeHint.hourly: Trigger once every hour, at a given minute.
modeHint.daily: Trigger every day at the selected hours.
modeHint.weekly: Trigger on the selected days of the week.
modeHint.monthly: Trigger on the selected days of the month.
modeHint.yearly: Trigger once a year on a specific month and day.
modeHint.advanced: Write a raw cron expression for full control.

history.deleteSelectedConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} message(s)? This will clear all history and cannot be undone.
